---
title: "alleleSpecMeth"
author: "Caitlin Page"
date: "2026-03-20"
output: workflowr::wflow_html
editor_options:
  chunk_output_type: inline
---

## Introduction

```{r}

```



```{r}
for_beta %>% mutate(alpha_cat = case_when(alpha >= 0.65 ~ "M", alpha <= 0.35 ~ "U", TRUE ~ "X")) %>%
  filter(total >= 3) %>%
  group_by(start, coverage, alpha_cat) %>%
  summarise(n=n()) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  group_by(start) %>%
  mutate(prop = n/sum(n)) %>%
```
